title: Black Bantha (disambiguation)
content:
'''Black Bantha''' could refer to a number of different objects in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]:

*[[The Black Bantha]], a propaganda [[Holodrama/Legends|holofilm]] issued by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],
*[[Black Banthas]], an Imperial walker unit.
*The [[Black Bantha Nebula/Legends|Black Bantha Nebula]], a [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] located inside the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], or
**The [[Battle of the Black Bantha]], a battle that took place near the nebula between [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces.

==Other uses==
*[[Bantha (disambiguation)|Bantha]]
*[[Black (disambiguation)|Black]]

{{Disambig}}
